## [00:00 - 01:29]

This is the Pup Gas Shot. I'm John Loomer. And today we're going to talk about how I publish one video every day. Let's go. Here's how I publish a video every day. I know it sounds difficult, but I'm telling you it's not. Some people batch record once per week, but I don't do this for lots of reasons. Mainly it just overwhelms me thinking about that. Typically, I'm just one day ahead. I record and edit a video for the next day. The process of planning to recording to editing to scheduling takes about an hour. If you don't have that much time, take less time. If I don't get that video done for the next day, I just know I have to get it done before the day is over. If I don't want to spend time recording videos over a weekend or when I'm going on vacation, I just need to prioritize. I need to get those videos done before then. Actually, I have a busy month ahead of me. I'm going to be out of town a few times. Because of that, I'm recording and editing two videos a day when I can. Bottom line, you can publish a video a day, but you have to be committed to it. You have to prioritize it. You have to have a no excuses approach.
